title: Daisy Derkins and the Dinosaur Apocalypse
original_title: Daisy Derkins and the Dinosaur Apocalypse
overview: An evil sorcerer teams up with a mad scientist to unleash Dinosaur Hell on Earth, and only Daisy Derkins and a hero from the future can stop them.
